login.title: Cafe Social
login.subtitle: Loyalty and social play at partner cafés — games when you’re there, or at home with a subscription.
login.verifySubtitle: We sent a code to your email. Enter it below.
login.signInFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Sign up with your email or a social account.
signUp.verifySubtitle: We sent a code to {{email}}. Enter it below.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Install and use the app anywhere: loyalty, friends, and venue perks stay available. Games are for when you’re actually at a partner café — unless you have a subscription, which also lets you play from home.
onboarding.venueBody: QR or a venue code isn’t a master key to the whole app — it checks you in for play and venue challenges while you’re on site. Away from cafés you still get loyalty and social features; games need a visit or a subscription.
onboarding.unlockBody: We can suggest a nearby partner venue. Checking in (QR or code while you’re there) turns on games for that visit. You’re always free to use the rest of the app without it.
onboarding.languageSubtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.locationBody: We use your rough position to suggest which partner café you’re near. You can refuse and still check in manually when you arrive — location never replaces being on site for venue play.
onboarding.staffBody: Verify guest perk redemptions and scan staff QR codes. Open Settings → Venue staff (staff mode) anytime.
onboarding.staffHint: If you play as a guest too, your player tips live in the main app — staff tools stay under Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Applies immediately. Saved on this device.
settings.locationHint: We use your location only to suggest nearby partner venues. Deny access if you want — you can still paste a venue code when you’re there to check in for games.
settings.locationGeofenceHint: While you’re checked in, the app may ask for “Always” location so iOS/Android can wake it briefly when you cross the venue boundary — we log enter/exit for analytics, not ads. “When in use” still works for games and detection while the app is open.
settings.notificationsHint: Choose which kinds of pushes we may send (word matches vs. partner offers). OS settings always apply.
settings.pushPartnerFootnote: Venue order nudges still respect “Total privacy” on the server.
settings.accountHint: Manage email and security in your Clerk profile (we’ll link deeper later).
settings.privacyHint: Discoverable: others can find you for challenges. Subscribers also see discoverable subscribers away from venues. Total privacy hides you from everyone for social features.
settings.friendInviteHint: Anyone with the link can add you as a friend after they sign in.
settings.legalHint: How we use location and notifications. Full text lives on the linked pages (required for app stores).
settings.legalDataSummary: Location: only to know you are at a partner venue. Notifications: word-match activity and optional partner venue offers if you allow them — you can turn partner offers off here; total privacy still applies on our servers for venue nudges.
settings.legalUrlMissing: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_PRIVACY_POLICY_URL in app config to show the privacy policy link.
settings.staffHint: Verify guest perk codes if your venue added you as EMPLOYEE, MANAGER, or OWNER in the partner CMS.
settings.subscriptionHint: Members unlock play from home and bonus perks at select premium partner venues. Status here is what our servers have on file after the store and RevenueCat sync.
settings.subscriptionPaywallLead: Subscribe in a few taps. You can restore past purchases or manage billing anytime in your store account.
settings.subscriptionUrlMissing: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_SUBSCRIPTION_URL in app config for a manage / checkout link if you offer web checkout.
settings.subscriptionSubscribe: Subscribe with App Store / Google Play
settings.subscriptionRcMissingKey: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_REVENUECAT_IOS_API_KEY and EXPO_PUBLIC_REVENUECAT_ANDROID_API_KEY for in-app subscriptions.
settings.subscriptionWebOnlyHint: In-app subscriptions use RevenueCat on iOS and Android. Use the web link below if your product includes web checkout.
settings.subscriptionOfferingsTitle: Subscription not ready in the app
settings.subscriptionOfferingsNoCurrent: RevenueCat has no “current” offering for this build. In the RevenueCat dashboard, set a current offering and attach your App Store / Play subscription products.
settings.subscriptionOfferingsNoPackages: The current offering has no packages. Add packages (monthly / annual, etc.) to that offering and ensure the store products are approved and linked.
settings.subscriptionPackageHintMonthlyFirst: Default plan we open first: monthly, then annual if monthly isn’t offered. Set EXPO_PUBLIC_REVENUECAT_PREFERRED_PACKAGE=annual to prefer yearly.
settings.subscriptionPackageHintAnnualFirst: Default plan we open first: annual, then monthly. Set EXPO_PUBLIC_REVENUECAT_PREFERRED_PACKAGE=monthly (or remove it) to prefer monthly.
settings.subscriptionPendingBanner: Payment went through — we’re waiting for your subscription to show up on our servers. This usually takes under a minute.
settings.subscriptionPendingFollowUp: Still not seeing “active”? The webhook may be slow. Tap refresh, try Restore purchases, or wait a minute and open this screen again.
settings.subscriptionPurchaseImmediate: You’re all set — your subscription is active.
settings.subscriptionPurchaseError: Purchase could not be completed. Try again or use Restore purchases.
settings.subscriptionRestoreActive: Restore worked — your subscription is active.
settings.subscriptionManageNativeError: Could not open subscription management. Open the App Store or Google Play subscription settings for this app.

chooseGame.title: Choose a game
chooseGame.subtitle: At a venue: games use that venue. With a subscription you can also play word games globally (no venue).
chooseGame.dailyWordNote: Looking for the one-a-day puzzle? It’s under Home → Daily word (not here).
chooseGame.wordDescription: Multi-round clue games: solo or create/join a room. Not the same as Daily word.
chooseGame.needVenue: Check in at a venue first.
chooseGame.brawlerDescription: Short arena battles with heroes and power-ups.
chooseGame.brawlerNeedVenue: Brawler needs a venue check-in (arena is tied to a location).

staff.venuesHint: Pick a venue to see today’s perk redemptions (UTC day) and optional QR verification.
staff.noVenues: You are not on staff for any venue yet. Ask your operator to add your email in the partner CMS.
staff.scanSubtitle: QR may contain the 8-character staff code or a redemption id. You can also type the code below.
staff.qrUnrecognized: Could not read a staff verification code from this QR.
staff.codeInvalid: Enter a valid 8-character code or UUID.
staff.highlightMissing: This code is not on the list for the selected UTC day — try another date or confirm the guest’s redemption.
staff.modPartnerToolsHint: Managers can take action in the partner portal; this is a read-only signal for on-site staff.

home.noVenueYet: No partner venue detected. Loyalty, friends, and invites still work. Games open when you’re at a café — or from home if you have a subscription.
home.lockedHintStandard: Venue games need location to confirm you’re on site. Loyalty and browsing stay available.
home.lockedHintPremium: Venue games need location here, or use a subscription for global play from anywhere.
home.venueTemporarilyUnavailable: This café isn’t running Cafe Social games right now. Offers and the rest of the app still work.
home.venueTemporarilyUnavailableShort: Games aren’t available at this venue for the moment.
home.bannedFromVenue: This venue has restricted your account from games and redemptions here. Contact the staff if you think this is a mistake.
home.unlockToStart: Be at the venue with location on, or subscribe for global play.
home.venueErrorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and that the app points at the right API (for example your computer’s IP on a physical device).
home.playLockedHint: Turn on location at a partner café, or use a subscription to play from anywhere.
home.explicitCheckInRequired: This café asks for a QR check-in. Scan the code at the venue (with location on) to unlock games and venue perks.
home.explicitCheckInChallengeLine: Check in with QR at this venue to continue.
home.playLockedExplicitCheckIn: This venue needs a one-time QR check-in while you’re on site. Allow location, then scan.
home.wordGamesCardBody: Daily word is one puzzle per day with limited tries (like Wordle). Word rooms are multi-round clue games — solo or with friends in a room.
home.linkDailyWordSub: One puzzle a day · limited guesses
home.venueFeedEmpty: No recent activity yet — start a match or solve the venue daily.
home.friendsVisitedVenue: {{count}} friends have visited this venue in the last 30 days.
home.venuePerksEmpty: No public perk teasers yet — staff can still give you a code to enter below in Redeem.

discoverHub.title: Discover
discoverHub.subtitle: Partner map, challenges across venues, and your overall progress.
discoverHub.openMapHint: Browse all cafés where Cafe Social runs.
discoverHub.challengesHint: See what you can complete today — venue and weekly goals.
discoverHub.qrCheckInHint: Scan a venue QR to unlock games when required.

inbox.title: Invites & requests
inbox.subtitle: Friend requests, party invites, and link codes you’ve received.
inbox.empty: Nothing pending — you’re all caught up.
inbox.friendWantsConnect: Wants to connect as a friend.
inbox.redeemLinkHint: Paste a party or friend invite token from email or messages.

venueHub.title: {{name}}
venueHub.subtitle: Everything for this location — offers, games, people, and perks.
venueHub.leaderboardEmpty: No rankings yet — be the first to earn XP at this café.
venueHub.lockedAtVenueHint: Turn on location or complete check-in to use venue games and some actions.
venueHub.venuesExploredMonth: {{n}} different venues visited in the last 30 days.

partnerMap.title: Partner venues
partnerMap.subtitle: Find cafés where Cafe Social is live. Visit in person to unlock venue games and challenges.
partnerMap.locationDenied: Location is needed for distance filtering.
partnerMap.empty: No partner venues are listed yet. Check back soon.
partnerMap.hintAtVenue: When you arrive, keep location on — games unlock inside the partner zone (or use a subscription from anywhere).
partnerMap.webListHint: Maps in the browser are limited — tap a venue for details and directions.

receiptSubmit.title: Submit receipt
receiptSubmit.hint: At the venue: attach a photo of your receipt if staff runs a proof-of-purchase program. Images are stored for review (90-day retention by default).
receiptSubmit.needLocationAtVenue: Enable location and stand inside this venue to submit a receipt.
receiptSubmit.sentBody: Venue staff will review your submission.

dailyWord.title: Daily word
dailyWord.outOfAttempts: Come back tomorrow for a new word.
dailyWord.needVenue: Detect a venue to play the venue daily.
dailyWord.globalRequiresSub: The global daily word needs an active subscription.
dailyWord.wordRoomsHint: For multi-round games with clues (solo or rooms), use Word rooms on Home — this screen is only the daily puzzle.
dailyWord.hardModeBlurb: The daily is the tougher puzzle: you only get extra clues after more attempts.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.weekly: Weekly challenge — progress resets each ISO week (UTC).

wordLobby.title: Word Game
wordLobby.globalLine: Global play — not tied to a venue (subscription).
wordLobby.appLanguageDeck: Word deck language (solo & when you host): {{lang}}
wordLobby.modeSoloHint: Play alone; your challenge can progress when you finish.
wordLobby.modeCoopHint: Create a room, share the code — one shared word at a time; everyone wins together.
wordLobby.modeVersusHint: Same word list for each player; first to finish all words wins.
wordLobby.easyDesc: Easy: one full-sentence clue per word.
wordLobby.normalDesc: Normal: sentence clue plus optional keyword list.
wordLobby.hardDesc: Hard: sentence clue plus optional emoji line.
wordLobby.cardSub: When you finish, we’ll update your in-venue challenge when rules allow.
wordLobby.deckLengthHint: Same deck length for everyone in a room.

wordMatch.joinSubtitle: Enter the 6-character room code from your friend.
wordMatch.waitCoop: Co-op: work through the same words together.
wordMatch.waitVersus: Versus: race to finish the deck first.
wordMatch.waitForFriend: Waiting for a friend to join…
wordMatch.needPresenceToCreate: Enable location and be at the café to create a venue room.

wordGame.title: Word Game
wordGame.easyNoExtra: Easy uses the clue above only.
wordGame.emptyDeck: No words are available right now. Try again later.
wordGame.matchDeckError: Could not load match deck. Ask the host to start the game.
wordGame.needVenuePresence: Enable location and be at this café to play.
wordGame.needVenueForMatch: Enable location and be at the venue for this match.
wordGame.matchLost: Good effort — someone else finished first.
wordGame.coopHint: Anyone in the room can submit the next guess.
wordGame.soloNotReady: Session not ready — wait a moment and try again.

qr.title: Check in at venue
qr.subtitle: Scan the QR at the café or paste the venue id (UUID) — for games and venue challenges, not the whole app.
qr.cameraDisabled: Camera QR scanning is temporarily disabled. Paste the venue id below and tap Unlock.
qr.webNoCamera: QR scan isn’t available on web — paste the venue id below.
qr.cameraDenied: Camera access is off. Enable it in Settings or paste the code.
qr.cameraPrompt: Allow camera to scan venue QR codes.
qr.scanUnrecognized: That QR isn’t a venue code we recognize.
qr.emptyCode: Code is empty. Paste a valid venue id.
qr.needLocationForCheckIn: Turn on location and try again — this venue confirms you’re on site when you check in.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your progress and unlocks
profile.expiringSoonHint: Perks ending within the next few days.
profile.recentPerksHint: History of perk codes you redeemed (latest first).
profile.recentPerksEmpty: No redemptions yet — visit a partner café and redeem an offer.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: XP at your current venue (per-venue stats).
leaderboard.subtitleVenue: XP at the venue you’re detected at right now.
leaderboard.subtitleGlobal: Total XP summed across all partner venues.
leaderboard.subtitleCountryGeneric: Total XP by country (uses detected venue’s country).
leaderboard.subtitleCityGeneric: Total XP by city (uses detected venue’s city + country).
leaderboard.needCountry: We need a detected venue with a country set. Visit a partner café or enable location.
leaderboard.needCityCountry: We need city + country from your detected venue for this ladder.
leaderboard.emptyVenue: No venue detected. Enable location or visit a partner café to see rankings.
leaderboard.emptyBoard: No scores yet. Play to earn XP!

parties.title: Parties
parties.empty: No parties yet. Create one or redeem an invite.
parties.createFailed: Could not create party (free tier: max 2 you create).
parties.leaveConfirm: You can rejoin with a new invite unless the party is full.
parties.kickConfirm: {{name}} will be removed from this party.
parties.transferConfirm: Make {{name}} the leader? You will lose leader powers unless you are selected again.

myReports.title: Your venue reports
myReports.subtitle: Status of safety reports you sent to venue staff. Staff may leave a short note when a report is closed.
myReports.empty: You haven’t filed any reports yet.

friends.title: Friends
friends.addByUsernameHint: Search is case-insensitive. They’ll get a request to accept.
friends.requestAlreadyPending: A request already exists or you’re already friends.
friends.blockedHint: Blocked players can’t friend you or appear in your social lists. You can unblock anytime.
friends.blockConfirm: {{username}} won’t be able to send friend requests or appear in your friend features. Any pending request is removed.

perk.title: Redeem perk
perk.subtitle: Enter the code from the venue (you must be on premise). Staff may ask you to scan a QR for some offers.
perk.needVenue: Enable location and stand inside the partner venue zone so we can confirm you’re on site.
perk.needLocationPrecise: We need a GPS fix to verify you’re inside the venue fence. Try again outdoors or near a window.
perk.wrongVenue: You opened redeem for a different venue than where you are now. Go to the right café or open Redeem from Home.
perk.showToStaff: Show this screen to staff if they need proof.
perk.qrUnlockHint: Check in (QR or invite) may be required before redeeming this one.
perk.fullyRedeemedLabel: Fully redeemed — ask staff for new codes.

redeem.title: Redeem invite
redeem.hint: Paste the token from a party or friend invite, or open a cafesocial:// link.

peopleHere.title: Who's here
peopleHere.subtitle: Players recently at this venue (respects privacy).
peopleHere.empty: Nobody visible right now — check discoverability in Settings or try again in a minute.

reportPlayer.title: Report a player
reportPlayer.subtitle: You’re flagging {{username}} for staff at this venue. Be specific and factual.
reportPlayer.signInRequired: Sign in to submit a report.
reportPlayer.successBody: Venue staff can review this in their partner tools. Thank you for helping keep the community safe.
reportPlayer.failed: Could not send report. Try again in a moment.
reportPlayer.footer: False or abusive reports may be reviewed. You can’t report yourself.

banAppeal.title: Appeal venue restriction
banAppeal.subtitle: Explain why you believe this restriction should be lifted. Venue managers review appeals in their tools.
banAppeal.signInRequired: Sign in to submit an appeal.
banAppeal.successBody: If managers follow up, they’ll use your account email. You can submit one open appeal per venue.
banAppeal.outcomeBodyLifted: Staff granted your appeal. You may be able to use games and redemptions at this venue again when you’re on site — pull to refresh the home screen after a moment.
banAppeal.outcomeBodyUpheld: Staff reviewed your appeal and the venue restriction is still in place. If you have new information, contact the venue directly.
banAppeal.outcomeBodyDismissed: Staff reviewed and closed your appeal without lifting the restriction. Contact the venue if you need more detail.
banAppeal.outcomeBodyOther: Staff updated your appeal. Check below for any message they left for you.
banAppeal.pendingBody: Venue managers have your message and will review it in their partner tools.
